title: P14.M1.E2.T003 Loader Boundary Review Fix
summary: Fix the review-found reload boundary where malformed config can be converted to defaults before the rollback transaction sees a failure.
goal: Complete the reopened P14.M1.E2.T003 review fix.

phases.name: implement
phases.title: Implement
phases.summary: Fix malformed/unreadable daemon reload behavior and add regression coverage.

jobs.name: p14-m1-e2-t003-loader-boundary-fix
jobs.prompt: Complete reopened backlog task P14.M1.E2.T003 review fix. Follow AGENTS.md plus src/test CLAUDE.md where relevant and follow PIRFL: inspect the real reload/config-load path, write a focused failing regression test first, implement the smallest production change, review, then fix. Do not run bl commands. Preserve Clawq casing. Implementation runner requirement: you are running as ccc @pi-mimo25p using mimo-v2.5-pro via pi. If you need a review-and-fix subagent, use an openai-codex/gpt-5.5 subagent via @cx-reviewer and tell it not to delegate. Review finding to fix: src/daemon.ml reloads at the SIGHUP and file-watch caller boundary via Config_loader.load; src/config_loader.ml currently catches config parse failures and returns defaults. A malformed or unreadable config during daemon reload can therefore publish a successful default config instead of failing and preserving the last valid effective policy. Acceptance for this repair: malformed/unreadable config in daemon SIGHUP/file-watch reload paths must preserve the last valid config/effective access policy; config set should keep its existing user-facing behavior unless the real code proves it shares this bug; rollback after late helper failures must still pass; runtime-bound tool refresh behavior from the prior T003 work must remain intact. Add tests that cover the loader boundary, not only injected failures inside apply_runtime_config_reload. Suggested starting points: Config_loader.load/load_result behavior in src/config_loader.ml; SIGHUP and file-watch reload sites around src/daemon.ml; existing reload tests around test/test_daemon.ml daemon cases 70-75. Keep src/daemon.ml under the 2000-line hard limit; if edits threaten that, move small helper code to an existing support module rather than growing daemon.ml. Required checks before commit: make test-run ARGS="test daemon 70-75" or update range if new cases are adjacent; make test-run ARGS="test config_loader" if config loading behavior changes; make test-run ARGS="test command_bridge 104-105" if config set behavior changes; make fmt-check. Commit the work on the branch with a concise message and summarize exact checks.
